display-1.purpose: Hero statements and the final CTA. One per section, at most. Hero <h1> carries a one-off uppercase + loosened-tracking override (2026-07-11).

display-2.purpose: Section headings ("What's different.", "Who holds the bitcoin.").

lead.purpose: Standalone introductory paragraphs following a Display heading. Capped at 48-55ch. Sized up from a tighter clamp (2026-07-11).

body.purpose: Pillar / column / accordion prose. Capped at 65ch.

label.purpose: Structural labels: footer column headers, footer copyright line, pill-tag chips.

shadows.name: glass-frost
shadows.purpose: The one shared frosted-glass surface: buttons (primary), the nav pill, and custody-comparison's checkpoint band/chips.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The frosted-glass CTA. Used at most once per section (header nav CTA, mobile drawer CTA).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: "Azeret Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(16% 0.015 260); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background: rgba(207,229,247,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.55), 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(30,64,120,0.28); transition: background-color 150ms, border-color 150ms, transform 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); background: rgba(207,229,247,0.75); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5b46d4; outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action adjacent to a primary CTA ("View source").
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: "Azeret Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(16% 0.015 260); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(78% 0.035 240); transition: border-color 150ms, background-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: rgba(20,24,31,0.4); background: rgba(20,24,31,0.05); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5b46d4; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Nav Pill
components.description: Floating glass-pill header (2026-07-11). Persistent from first paint, insets from the top/sides, intensifies slightly past 20px of scroll.
components.html: cashu.meOpen Wallet
components.css: .ds-nav-shell { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-nav-pill { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; width: 100%; max-width: 1024px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background: rgba(207,229,247,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.55), 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(30,64,120,0.28); transition: background-color 500ms, border-color 500ms; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(16% 0.015 260); }

components.name: Bento Card
components.description: Bento grid exception (2026-07-11): the three bento cards carry the button glass recipe instead of the flat bg-muted/hairline-border treatment. The one card-like container the system uses.
components.html:
Account wallets see everything.

Every send, every receive, every contact, tied to a single account in someone else's database.
components.css: .ds-bento-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding: 32px 32px 0; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background: rgba(207,229,247,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.55), 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(30,64,120,0.28); } .ds-bento-card h3 { font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 48px); color: oklch(16% 0.015 260); } .ds-bento-card p { margin-top: 16px; font-family: "Geist Sans", sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(20,24,31,0.7); }

components.name: Custodial Field Chip
components.description: Custody-comparison exception (2026-07-11): field chips (ID, TO, amount, timestamp) carry the button glass recipe instead of a flat hairline border.
components.css: .ds-chip-custodial { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: "Azeret Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(20,24,31,0.8); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background: rgba(207,229,247,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.55), 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(30,64,120,0.28); }

components.name: Valid Chip
components.description: Mint-lane "VALID" chip. Same glass recipe as chip-custodial, with the Scan Color Exemption's green tint layered on top (container styling only, color system unchanged).
components.css: .ds-chip-valid { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: "Azeret Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #16a34a; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #16a34a 40%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklab, #16a34a 8%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.55), 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(30,64,120,0.28); }

narrative.overview: cashu.me is a specimen page for a piece of digital cash. Type is the artifact. The page reads like a museum caption: dispassionate, precise, large, asking the viewer to look without selling them anything. The visitor moves down the page the way you move down a printed broadsheet, not the way you scroll a feed. The aesthetic is editorial and committed, not enterprise. Restraint is the voice: generous whitespace, oversize display, mono labels for structural chrome. The single chromatic note is a soft lilac reserved for emphasis. The page rejects every dominant crypto-site reflex (neon, chart-heavy, pastel, navy-and-gold); the earlier blanket 'not glassmorphic' stance is retired as of 2026-07-11, replaced by one named, deliberate frosted-glass recipe scoped to three surfaces (buttons, nav pill, custody-comparison chips), distinct from decorative Web3-dashboard glassmorphism.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial scale (hero up to ~10rem at large viewports), tight tracking (-0.035em), short leading (0.94).
One continuous daylight-sky surface page-wide; the earlier alternating [data-theme] plates are retired but the token architecture is kept.
Lilac accent used sparingly: CTA hover, link underlines, ::selection. Never large fields.
Native <details> accordion, native <a> rectangular buttons. No bespoke widgets where the platform suffices.
Phone placeholders maintain device proportions (9:19.5); no skeuomorphic chrome.
One shared frosted-glass recipe (2026-07-11), reused verbatim by buttons, the nav pill, and custody-comparison chips rather than three separate treatments.

rules.name: The Ambient Sky Rule
rules.body: The sky is ambient, not the subject. Clouds are photographic cutouts only, sized larger on desktop than mobile, at most ~3 visible per viewport-height, never behind running text or interactive targets.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Cashu Lilac is the sole chromatic note in the system. It appears on no more than ~5% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Scan Color Exemption
rules.body: The --scan token (green) is the sole sanctioned non-lilac chromatic, scoped to custody-comparison.tsx where it carries the surveillance metaphor. It must not appear elsewhere on the page.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black, No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Every surface and neutral tints toward a hue. The reference hue for neutrals is the sky's (~240-260).

rules.name: The Specimen Scale Rule
rules.body: Display 1 is reserved for the page's apex moment: the opening hero. No element in the body of the page ever reaches that size.

rules.name: The Wordmark Tier
rules.body: A single scale step exists above Display 1 (type-wordmark), reserved for the footer brand sign-off and never appearing elsewhere.

rules.name: The Balanced Wrap Rule
rules.body: All headings carry text-wrap: balance. All long-form prose carries text-wrap: pretty.

rules.name: The Mono-as-Structure Rule
rules.body: Mono is structural, not decorative. It appears on index marks, pill-tag chips, eyebrow labels, button labels, and the footer version stamp. It does not appear on body prose or headings.

rules.name: The Button-Label Rule
rules.body: Azeret Mono carries every button label on the page, tracking 0.06em at weight 500.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, inputs, sections, and chips are flat at rest. Shadows are reserved for physical-object depictions and the button system's frosted-glass treatment.

dos: Do keep Cashu Lilac at ≤5% of any screen. Its rarity is the point.
Do invert surfaces between sections (dark → light → dark) the way a printed monograph alternates plates and text.
Do use native <details> for accordions, <a> for buttons, <section data-theme> for theme scope. Lean on the platform.
Do cap body lines at 65ch using max-w-[65ch]. Cap lead lines at 48-55ch.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on prose.
Do keep the navbar a floating glass pill inset from the viewport edges, not an edge-to-edge bar.
donts: Don't use neon-on-black crypto colors. No electric green/blue/orange neon, no 3D rendered logos, no futurist UI.
Don't use consumer-fintech pastels, friendly mascots, or gradient illustrations. Sanctioned exception: the single page-wide sky gradient and its photographic cloud cutouts.
Don't lean on bank navy + gold institutional gravitas. Wrong register entirely.

Don't use Web3 / DeFi maximalism: rainbow accents, dashboard-heavy charts, chart-driven hero treatments, or glass used decoratively/everywhere. Sanctioned exception: the one shared frosted-glass recipe on buttons, the nav pill, and custody-comparison's checkpoint/chips only.
Don't use card grids with icon + heading + subtitle templates. Sections are typographic compositions, not cards.
Don't use em dashes in user-facing copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or border-left side stripes.
Don't use display fonts other than Manrope. Geist Sans is body-only; Azeret Mono is labels/buttons only.
Don't use Cashu Lilac for text on white; switch to Cashu Lilac Deep on Specimen Cream.
Don't apply ambient shadows to flat surfaces beyond the sanctioned phone/banknote and frosted-glass exceptions.
Don't ship a heading without text-wrap: balance or prose without text-wrap: pretty.
Don't redefine tokens at the call site. New utilities go through the @theme inline block in globals.css.
Don't claim 'self-custodial' or 'no custodian.' Cashu is custodial; the accurate framing is bearer ecash plus unconditional withdrawal.
